usage: roborepo skill link    [--dry-run] [--uninstall]   alias for "skill install"
roborepo skill sync    [--check]                    sync harness shared skill links
roborepo update  [--dry-run]   re-apply harness config (first install: scripts/install/main.sh)
roborepo sync                  pull live config back into the repo
roborepo rules   [--check]     render/check generated agent rules
[path] is optional (defaults to the current directory) and may be relative or absolute.

menu.label: update
menu.desc: re-apply harness config on this machine (pick up new config)

menu.label: index code
menu.desc: index this repo's code for jcodemunch

menu.label: index docs
menu.desc: index this repo's docs for jdocmunch

menu.label: mcp add
menu.desc: register an MCP server with Claude + Codex

menu.label: run
menu.desc: run a command with trimmed output

menu.label: skill export
menu.desc: copy shared skills into this repo

menu.label: sync
menu.desc: pull live config back into the repo
